message:
perf(mvcc): replace BTreeSet with Vec+sort+dedup and linear find with binary_search in shard lookups

Shard index collections are typically 1-4 entries. Replacing BTreeSet
allocation with Vec + sort_unstable + dedup avoids B-tree node overhead.
Replacing linear .iter().find() with .binary_search_by_key() in
commit_write_set_locked and validate_ssi_read_set_locked tightens the
hot path for sharded MVCC commits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
